title: Bossbar Expansion
description: This data pack/Mod add bossbar to minibosses in the game like Warden, Elder Guardian and Evoker.
body:
# About
This data pack/Mod add bossbar to minibosses in the game like Warden, Elder Guardian and Evoker.

# settings
You can disable any bossbar or uninstall the data pack on the settings, run this command to open the settings:

**/function bbe:settings**
## Warden
Warden's bossbar will appear if the player is within 40 blocks of the Warden.
![Warden Bossbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YTw3asxh/images/d09a81887a5420facdfe457c1764bbbc082e161a_350.webp)
## Elder Guardian
Elder Guardian's bossbar will appear if the player is within 15 blocks of the Elder Guardian.
![Elder Guardian Bossbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YTw3asxh/images/ba32f7496810a859d3c4817ae82a231175d0631f_350.webp)
## Evoker
Evoker's bossbar will appear if the player is within 10 blocks of the Evoker.
![Evoker Bossbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YTw3asxh/images/d79b74fde21b7cd7c2c871bfbb6e64510609b435_350.webp)
